--- IMAGES ---

IMAGE 1:
URL: https://www.questionpro.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/how-to-do-a-thematic-analysis.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The visual outlines the steps for conducting a thematic analysis in psychology, including phases like familiarization, identifying themes, reviewing those themes, finalizing them, and writing the report, with corresponding illustrations for each step.

IMAGE 2:
URL: https://i.pinimg.com/originals/55/6c/47/556c470d8a8f99800ee2dc5ab0b900d1.png
DESCRIPTION: A colorful diagram outlines the phases of thematic analysis, detailing steps such as familiarization with data, generating initial codes, searching for themes, reviewing themes, defining and naming themes, and producing a report, with additional notes on validating and interpreting findings.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://images.examples.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Examples-of-Thematic-Analysis.png
DESCRIPTION: The content features various icons representing different types of thematic analysis, including customer feedback, political speech, cultural studies, psychological research, and marketing research.

enriched_points.expanded_content: A qualitative method for identifying and analyzing patterns in data, enabling researchers to categorize and interpret diverse educational experiences effectively.
Involves applying mathematical techniques to quantify data, allowing for the examination of relationships and effects within educational frameworks, enhancing evidence-based decision-making.
Utilizes different educational models as reference points, facilitating the assessment of various lifelong learning strategies and their effectiveness across diverse contexts.
